phase_goal: Build the smallest production-shaped Cranfield/OpenSearch baseline with search, explain, evaluation, and public-readiness evidence.
active_blockers: Live OpenSearch Cranfield corpus and credentials are not configured.
Cloudflare Worker deployment target and public endpoint URLs are not configured.
next_recommended_actions: Provision or select the OpenSearch runtime for Cranfield.
Load the full Cranfield corpus into cranfield-v0.
Run live OpenSearch evaluation and record MAP, nDCG, Precision, Recall, MRR, average latency, and p95 latency.
Deploy the Worker to Cloudflare and publish public search/explain URLs.
